title: Extra hidden charges on Women 😳 #women #womenempowerment #pinktax #finance #financetips #finsaheli
description:
Women are paying extra hidden charges without knowing this! 😳
Pink Tax is an additional amount charged by companies on women oriented products and play with their psychology. 
.
.
To avoid this, consider checking out unisex products or gender neutral products 🌸
.
.
.
